overall.description: Gameplay footage from Black Myth: Wukong showing the protagonist exploring a dark volcanic shrine with a massive golden Buddha statue and glowing lava formations, then transitioning via fade-to-black to a misty forest environment labeled 'Mount Huaguo Foothills' with dense vegetation and white wildflowers.

scene_state.functional_zone: volcanic shrine with massive Buddha statue and lava formations

events.description: screen fades to black indicating transition to new environment

agents.ego_description: walking slowly around the massive golden Buddha statue, observing the volcanic shrine environment and glowing lava pillar

entered.detail: tall vertical structure with cracked glowing red-orange lava patterns
giant seated Buddha figure with ornate headdress and detailed stone base
dark rocky terrain with scattered debris and ash
large wooden prayer wheel attached to the Buddha statue base

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dark volcanic shrine environment dominated by a massive golden Buddha statue on the right and a towering glowing lava pillar on the left. The ground is covered in volcanic rock and ash. The character walks around the statue, revealing ancient shrine architecture and a large prayer wheel structure attached to the base, before the scene fades to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty mountain foothills with wildflowers and pine forest

events.description: fade in from black to reveal misty forest environment with text 'Mount Huaguo Foothills'
distant white animals become visible grazing in the meadow ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass and white wildflowers in the misty foothills, heading toward distant forest

notable_agents.action: white sheep or goats grazing in the distant meadow near the tree line

entered.detail: dense forest of tall evergreen trees shrouded in morning mist
clusters of small white flowers growing throughout the tall grass
steep rocky cliff wall covered in patches of moss and vegetation
large boulders covered in green moss along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a misty forest environment labeled 'Mount Huaguo Foothills'. The character walks through tall grass and dense white wildflowers toward a forest of tall pine trees. A steep mountain cliff face is visible to the left, and distant white animals graze near the tree line. The atmosphere is cool and damp with diffused morning light filtering through the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey that transforms from a dark, oppressive volcanic shrine into a serene, misty mountain forest. It begins with the character navigating a landscape of volcanic rock and ash, moving between a towering glowing lava pillar and a massive golden Buddha statue. As the character circles the statue to reveal ancient shrine architecture and a large prayer wheel, the scene fades into a deep blackness. This darkness then gives way to the cool, damp atmosphere of the Mount Huaguo Foothills, where the camera emerges into a field of tall grass and dense white wildflowers. The scene finally expands toward a forest of tall pine trees and a steep mountain cliff, with diffused morning light filtering through the mist as distant white animals graze near the tree line.
